content: My webhook keeps failing when I try to subscribe to ticket.resolved events

If your webhook is failing, ensure your endpoint returns HTTP 200 within 5 seconds of the test POST request. Endpoints that timeout or return any other status code will be marked as inactive and must be re-verified.
Also, I think I was charged twice this month
Last charge was on 49PLN on 1 April 2026
Can I open a refund request for the extra charge
Refund request has been opened. you will receive answer in 30 days
